item.title: Dates
item.description: Dates Paper submission deadline: November 17th, 2025 December 7th, 2026 Paper notification: January 5th, 2025 January 15, 2027 Camera Ready Deadline: February 2nd, 2027 Workshop: 8 March, 2027 For your Camera Ready, please refer to the official PerCom instructions

item.title: Previous Events
item.description: Previous Events This workshop is the first edition of PerAgent @ PerCom.

item.title: Program
item.description: Program The workshop will be a full day workshop on the 8th of March 2027 Time Title Authors 08:30-09:00Registration Session 1: Welcome & KeynoteChair: Sajal K. Das 09:00-09:20Welcome to PerAgentDipanwita Thakur, Vishesh Kumar Tanwar, Pandarasamy Arjunan, Hirozumi Yamaguchi 09:20-10:20Keynote: XXXXXXAntonio Virdis 10:20-10:30Joint Q&A 10:30-11:00Coffee Break Session 2: XXXXXChair: XXXXX 11:00-11:20TitleAuthors <tr class="qa-row"><td>12:20-12:30</td><td>Joint Q&A</td><td></td></tr> <tr class="lunch-break"><td>12:30-14:00</td><td>Lunch Break</td><td></td></tr> <tr class="session-row"><td></td><td>Session 3: XXXXX</td><td>Chair: XXXX</td></tr> <tr><td>14:00-14:20</td><td><em>Title</em></td><td>Authors</td></tr> <tr class="qa-row"><td>15:20-15:30</td><td>Joint Q&A</td><td></td></tr> <tr class="coffee-break"><td>15:30-16:00</td><td>Coffee Break</td><td></td></tr> <tr class="session-row"><td></td><td>Session 4: XXXX</td><td>Chair: XXXXX</td></tr> <tr><td>16:00-16:20</td><td><em>Title</em></td><td>Authors</td></tr> <tr class="qa-row"><td>17:20-17:30</td><td>Joint Q&A</td><td></td></tr> <tr class="closing-row"><td>17:30-18:00</td><td>Closing</td><td>Dipanwita Thakur, Vishesh Kumar Tanwar, Pandarasamy Arjunan, Hirozumi Yamaguchi</td></tr> </tbody> Keynote: XXXXXXX Keynote: XXXXX Speaker: XXXXX

item.title: Accepted Papers
item.description: Accepted Papers We received a total of XX submissions to the workshop, out of which we accepted XX for presentation. We thank all authors and reviewers for their contribution to the PerAgent Workshop. Authors Title Authors Title
The 24th International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications (PerCom 2027) March 08 – 12, 2027, Goa India Conference Overview // TODO Percom Info
